originStatement: Project owner states each selected image was generated with ChatGPT for this project and may be used in the project.

assets.import: single sprite; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; repeat wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Near-square source; consumers must avoid visible seams and distortion when tiling.

assets.alpha: none; checkerboard is baked into RGB pixels
assets.import: single opaque sprite; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; clamp wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Requires a clean transparent replacement before production use.

assets.import: single opaque sprite; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; clamp wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Reference image only; not a room layout, collision source, or shippable background.

assets.alpha: none; checkerboard is baked into RGB pixels
assets.import: single opaque sprite; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; clamp wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Requires a clean transparent replacement before production use.

assets.import: single alpha sprite; alpha-as-transparency on; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; clamp wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Prototype scale and visual footprint must be checked at the intended camera framing.

assets.alpha: none; checkerboard is baked into RGB pixels
assets.import: single opaque sprite; 256 PPU; mipmaps off; clamp wrap; sRGB
assets.limitation: Presentation only; it grants no explosive behavior and needs a clean cutout before production use.
